calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Janevette Cole and Defendant, Halimah Wadi appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties. Trial date is vacated.
